articles.title: LUNC Community Clamors For Coinbase Listing, Can It Reach $1?
articles.description: LUNA Classic (LUNC) is still going strong despite losing more than 99.99% of its value during the market crash. It now also boasts one of the strongest and most active crypto communities on social media, which have now taken their combined power towards getting the coin listed on large exchanges. This time around, the community has turned its attention to Coinbase. Calls To List On Coinbase...

articles.title: Do Kwon Continues Cashing out of Terra While Investors Remain Hopeful
articles.description: On-chain records suggest that Terraform Labs CEO and co-founder Do Kwon has been cashing out Terra (LUNA) to a Binance wallet while shilling the new coin on Twitter.

articles.title: Polygon launches testnet for Layer 2 network Hermez
articles.description: Polygon is launching a public testnet for Ethereum scaling solution Hermez, as the race for a dominant Ethereum Layer 2 solution gets underway.

articles.description: The Ethereum network has seen its biggest one-day growth so far in 2022, with the total number of wallet addresses on the network hitting a fresh all-time high over the weekend. articles.title: BNB Chain back online after devs deploy update to save funds
articles.description: Through quick identification and cooperation of network validators, most funds were saved in last week’s BNB Chain exploit.

articles.title: Over 12,000 Brazil companies declare crypto holdings in record high
articles.description: August figures released by Brazil’s tax authority revealed over 12,000 companies have cryptocurrency holdings, the largest amount ever recorded.

articles.title: McCrypto: McDonald’s Accepts Bitcoin in the Swiss City of Lugano
articles.description: McCrypto: McDonald's fast-food chain began accepting Bitcoin payments in the Swiss city of Lugano. USDT and the local token is also accepted.
